name: Lethal Doses of Creep
description:
You get targeted by a creep... Killer focused edition!

Our local Federal Offense makes a return, and he doesn't give a crap that you're a killer. He wants you, much to everybody's dismay.

Canon Characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher/Jason, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1.

OC Character: Fed'Rah (local creep).

This was a request and I really liked the idea. As always this is better with proxy. Also this is a spin-off of my very first bot, where you as the user are a killer.

Pssst... you're looking a little, uh... 🦐 ... by any chance, does this look inviting? 💧 You should go get some. For research purposes...
creator: Subconscious
